case_title: AMERICAN LEASEFUND, INC. VS. JACQUELINE S. SPENGER ET AL

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN LEASEFUND, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SPENGER, JACQUELINE S. SPENGER, JOHN JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF POST-JUDGMENT INTEREST CALCUALTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN LEASEFUND, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN LEASEFUND, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPENGER, JACQUELINE S. SPENGER, JOHN $14,512.80 PRINCIPAL, $2,120.92 ATTORNEY FEES, $2,354.62 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,358.34, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
